original_statement: "Spain is our top-rated team — though only barely over Argentina — with roster adjustments that move them slightly back toward the rest of the pack [in the PELE model for the 2026 FIFA World Cup]. England and France are essentially tied for the #3 position."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Pre-tournament team ratings
statement_context: Excerpt from comprehensive 100,000-simulation tournament forecast published by Silver Bulletin on 2026-06-03. Co-authored by Nate Silver and Joseph George using the PELE model.
resolution_criteria: Spain has the highest pre-tournament PELE rating among all teams in Nate Silver's Silver Bulletin analysis published on or around 2026-06-03, with Argentina rated second and England/France tied for third.
source_text_snippet: Spain is our top-rated team — though only barely over Argentina — with roster adjustments that move them slightly back toward the rest of the pack. England and France, meanwhile, are essentially tied for the #3 position.
